_comment_format: Keys are the raw bid item description (lowercased, trimmed). Values are the Service Items name from the workbook (or 'Labor!' / 'Materials!').
_comment_location: Active file lives at %APPDATA%/work-order-tracker/service_item_overrides.json. Copy this template there and edit.
_comment_precedence: Overrides win over everything: exact match, jaccard, keyword fallback.
